# growthbook_dimension (Resource)

A GrowthBook user dimension. Dimensions slice experiment results by a user attribute derived from a SQL query against a data source.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "growthbook_dimension" "signup_source" {
  name            = "Signup source"
  datasource_id   = "ds_warehouse"
  identifier_type = "user_id"
  query           = "SELECT user_id, signup_source AS value FROM users"
  owner           = "data-team"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `datasource_id` (String) ID of the data source this dimension queries.
- `identifier_type` (String) Identifier type the dimension applies to (e.g. `user`, `anonymous`).
- `name` (String) Human-readable dimension name.
- `query` (String) SQL query (or equivalent) that defines the dimension.

### Optional

- `description` (String) Optional description of the dimension.
- `managed_by` (String) Where the dimension is managed from: empty (anywhere) or `api`.
- `owner` (String) User ID or email of the dimension owner.

### Read-Only

- `date_created` (String) Creation timestamp.
- `date_updated` (String) Last update timestamp.
- `id` (String) Unique dimension identifier (e.g. `dim_...`).
